# [clang] clang trunk crashes at (anonymous namespace)::JumpScopeChecker::DiagnoseIndirectOrAsmJump(clang::Stmt*, unsigned int, clang::LabelDecl*, unsigned int)

**Author:** yijan4845
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/113325

## Body

**This testcase is generated by a fuzzer.**

Compiler explorer: [https://godbolt.org/z/jT55687eW](https://godbolt.org/z/jT55687eW)

This invalid code will crash on both Clang Trunk and Clang Assertion Trunk:
```cpp
void func() {
  try { } catch(...) {
    __label__ label;
    asm goto("" : : : : label);
  };
}
```

It seems that this goes back to clang-17.

Stack dump:
```
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
Stack dump:
0.	Program arguments: /opt/compiler-explorer/clang-assertions-trunk/bin/clang++ -gdwarf-4 -g -o /app/output.s -mllvm --x86-asm-syntax=intel -fno-verbose-asm -S --gcc-toolchain=/opt/compiler-explorer/gcc-snapshot -fcolor-diagnostics -fno-crash-diagnostics <source>
1.	<eof> parser at end of file
2.	<source>:1:13: parsing function body 'func'
```

---

### Comment 2 - shafik

This example also crashes starting on clang-17 and feels similar: https://godbolt.org/z/xjzacrd8T

Assertion:

```console
clang++: /root/llvm-project/llvm/tools/clang/lib/Sema/JumpDiagnostics.cpp:748:
void {anonymous}::JumpScopeChecker::VerifyJumps():
Assertion `Permissive || !(!LabelAndGotoScopes.count(SC))' failed.
```

Code:

```cpp
int f(){
    switch(0){
        struct a {
            int i:({case 0:; 1;});
        };            
    }
}
```

The original does not assert but I am hoping that they both have the same underlying cause. At least this case should be ill-formed.

---
